revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-155

1. The operation of placing a point object at the focus of an optical apparatus.

2. The operation of placing a light source about or near the focus of an optical apparatus in such a way as to produce a desired light distribution.


{{IALAFooter}}
